Cannot verify without executing the task and creating the actual ODT file. However, ODT files (ZIP-based format) containing tables and embedded PNG images typically exceed 5KB.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a one-page film production call sheet for 'The Midnight Echo' (Day 14 of 24 production). The document must include production logo, shooting schedule and cast tables, weather/hospital information, and be saved as an ODT file. All metadata claims are verified against the synthetic production data: film title is 'The Midnight Echo', day designation is 'Day 14 of 24', schedule contains scene 42 with cast member Elena Rostova at pickup time 05:45, and minimum 2 tables are required. Data is fully synthetic, generated procedurally within the task setup script with no external data sources.
